LanguageData.DW_Bullet_Toxic_Needle_II.label: Needle
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_Toxic_Needle_Spread_II.label: Needle
LanguageData.DW_NeedlePistol_II.label: Branx MKII Needle Pistol
LanguageData.DW_NeedlePistol_II.description: Sometimes known as a needler, this weapon is a favourite among those who prefer a less showy method of assassination.
LanguageData.DW_NeedlePistol_II.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_Toxic_Needle_VI.label: Needle
LanguageData.DW_NeedlePistol_VI.label: Branx MKVI Needle Pistol
LanguageData.DW_NeedlePistol_VI.description: One of the more esoteric weapons found in the Hive Scum's arsenal, this light weight pistol delivers virulent toxins via laser guided energy bursts.
LanguageData.DW_NeedlePistol_VI.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_Dual_Autopistols_III.label: Bullet
LanguageData.DW_Dual_Autopistols_III.label: Branx Mk III Dual Autopistols
LanguageData.DW_Dual_Autopistols_III.description: Forged in the local weapon manufactorums of Branx Magna, these twinned autopistols deliver concentrated bursts of fire.
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_Dual_Stub_Pistols_VIII.label: Bullet
LanguageData.DW_Dual_Stub_Pistols_VIII.label: Branx MkVIII Dual Stub Pistols
LanguageData.DW_Dual_Stub_Pistols_VIII.description: What's better than one gun? That's right, two guns at the same time!
LanguageData.DW_Improvised_Shivs_I.label: Improvised Mk I Shivs
LanguageData.DW_Improvised_Shivs_I.description: Ideal for twisting into your foe's guts.
LanguageData.DW_Improvised_Shivs_I.tools.0.label: Light attack
LanguageData.DW_Improvised_Shivs_I.tools.1.label: Heavy attack
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_PoisonKnife.label: Poison Knife
LanguageData.DW_Ability_ThrowPoisonKnife.label: Throwing Knife
LanguageData.DW_Ability_ThrowPoisonKnife.description: Throws a poisoned knife at the target.
LanguageData.DW_Chirurgeons_BoneSaw_IV.label: Chirurgeon's Mk IV Bone Saw
LanguageData.DW_Chirurgeons_BoneSaw_IV.description: Normally found in the hands of a skilled apothecarion, this serrated blade will make short work of bone or sinew.
LanguageData.DW_Chirurgeons_BoneSaw_IV.tools.0.label: Edge
LanguageData.DW_Enginseers_Crowbar_VI.label: Enginseer's Mk VI Crowbar
LanguageData.DW_Enginseers_Crowbar_VI.description: A simple tool turned into a devastating melee weapon. The Hive Scum's propensity for ingenuity and ultra-violence shines through this brutal instrument.
LanguageData.DW_Enginseers_Crowbar_VI.tools.0.label: Edge
